title: Create: Adventure Begins!
description: A modpack to make the create mod less of a hustle and more of a adventure!
body:
# Create: Adventure Begins!

Welcome to a world where engineering meets exploration. **Create: Adventure Begins!** is designed to be a balanced experience that enhances the core charm of Minecraft without making it feel like a completely different game. Whether you want to build a massive automated factory, trek through overhauled dungeons, or simply enjoy a more vibrant world, this pack is built to provide a stable and immersive journey.

## Features

* **Mechanical Mastery**: Build intricate moving contraptions and automated systems using the **Create** mod. This version expands your engineering toolkit with **The Factory Must Grow**, **Dreams n' Desires**, and **Power Loader**.
* **A Living World**: Encounter a massive variety of wildlife with **Alex's Mobs**. Explore beautifully enhanced biomes from **Geophilic**.
* **Total Dungeon Overhaul**: Discover completely redesigned caves, mineshafts, and strongholds thanks to the full **YUNG’s Better** series and **Explorify**.
* **Homesteading & Storage**: Master the culinary arts with **Farmer’s Delight** and **Ratatouille**. Keep your items organized with **Sophisticated Backpacks**, **Tom’s Simple Storage**, and **Lootr**.
* **The Stars Above**: Journey beyond the world with the **Northstar Redux** space expansion.
* **Atmospheric Detail**: Experience the world through **AmbientSounds**, **Presence Footsteps**, and **Sound Physics Remastered**.

## Performance First

This pack is built on a high-performance foundation. By utilizing **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **Ferrite Core**, and **ModernFix**, we ensure the game runs as smoothly as possible even with complex machinery.

---

## PC Specification Settings (Recommended)

<details>
<summary>Low-End PCs (Integrated Graphics / 4GB RAM)</summary>

* **Video Settings**: Set Render Distance to 6-8 chunks.
* **Graphics**: Set to 'Fast'.
* **Clouds**: Set to 'Fast' or 'Off'.
* **Shaders**: Keep disabled for best performance.
* **Resource Packs**: Disable "Stay True" to save memory.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Mid-Range PCs (Dedicated GPU / 8GB RAM)</summary>

* **Video Settings**: Set Render Distance to 10-12 chunks.
* **Graphics**: Set to 'Fancy'.
* **Shaders**: Complementary or BSL (Medium settings).
* **Resource Packs**: All enabled.
</details>

<details>
<summary>High-End PCs (Modern GPU / 12GB+ RAM)</summary>

* **Video Settings**: Set Render Distance to 16+ chunks.
* **Graphics**: Set to 'Fabulous!'.
* **Shaders**: Bliss or Photon (Ultra settings).
* **Resource Packs**: All enabled.
</details>

---

## Setup & Launch Guide

<details>
<summary>How to Launch</summary>

1.  Download the pack via the Modrinth App.
2.  Ensure you have allocated at least 4GB to 6GB of RAM in the profile settings.
3.  Hit Play and wait for the **Seamless Loading Screen** to finish.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Shaders Setup (Optional)</summary>

The pack includes **Iris** for shader support. To use them:
1.  Go to **Options** > **Video Settings** > **Shader Packs**.
2.  Select your preferred shader from the list:
    * **Bliss**: For a realistic, atmospheric look.
    * **BSL**: The classic, high-performance standard.
    * **Complementary**: A perfect balance of visuals and performance.
    * **Photon**: Lightweight and modern.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Resource Packs Setup (Optional)</summary>

To enable the custom look of the pack, go to **Options** > **Resource Packs** and move these to the right side:
* **Fresh Animations**: (Classic horses, Creepers, Details, Emissive, Objects, and Quivers).
* **Lower utilities and eating animations**: For a cleaner first-person view.
* **Mandala's GUI**: For a polished, themed interface.
* **Stay True**: For enhanced vanilla-style textures.
</details>
